overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The player navigates beneath highway overpasses, past neon-lit vendor stalls, up to an elevated pedestrian plaza, and approaches the Delamain building entrance. The scene features dense cyberpunk architecture with heavy use of cyan and magenta neon lighting reflecting off wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass with food vendors

events.description: passing by a food vendor stall with bright cyan neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dark covered walkway beneath a highway overpass, passing concrete pillars and vendor stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars creating a tunnel-like effect
small food cart with bright cyan neon lighting and steam rising
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
rain-slicked concrete surface reflecting the ambient neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, covered walkway beneath a massive highway overpass. The player walks forward past concrete pillars and a food vendor stall illuminated by cyan neon lights. The wet pavement reflects the sparse lighting, and a few pedestrians walk ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass beneath active highway with traffic

events.description: vehicles passing by on the left side, headlights illuminating the wet road
approaching the end of the underpass, bright neon lights from the city becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the dark overpass, staying close to the wall as vehicles pass by on the left

notable_agents.action: white sedan with headlights on driving past, reflecting off the wet asphalt

entered.detail: multi-lane road with moving traffic separated from the sidewalk by a low barrier
large illuminated advertisements and holographic displays visible at the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The player walks through the darkest section of the underpass, with vehicles passing on the left and their headlights cutting through the darkness. Large digital billboards become visible at the far end, glowing with pink and cyan light. The environment remains enclosed by concrete walls and the highway above.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional urban corridor between overpass and elevated plaza

events.description: exiting the covered underpass into a more open area with glass skyscrapers visible
approaching and beginning to ascend the outdoor staircase to the upper level

agents.ego_description: walking out from under the overpass and approaching a wide stairway leading to an elevated pedestrian plaza

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead toward the staircase

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass windows displaying corporate logos
wide concrete stairs with illuminated edges leading up to the elevated walkway
tropical vegetation lining the upper plaza level

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens up to reveal a futuristic cityscape with glass skyscrapers and palm trees. The player approaches a wide outdoor staircase leading to an upper pedestrian level. The lighting shifts from dark shadows to bright neon illumination from the surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with glass flooring and panoramic city views

events.description: ascending the stairs to the upper plaza level
reaching the top of the stairs and entering the open elevated plaza with glass floor sections

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs to the elevated walkway while looking up at the surrounding skyscrapers and neon-lit cityscape

entered.detail: transparent glass walkway with metal framing overlooking the street level below
futuristic automated kiosks with purple coloring and yellow hazard stripes
linear cyan and pink neon tubes running along the edges of the plaza
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and holographic advertisements against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The player ascends to an elevated pedestrian plaza with transparent glass flooring sections overlooking the street below. The area is bathed in vibrant neon light from surrounding advertisements and light strips. Purple vending machines line the right side, and the sprawling city skyline is visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level commercial walkway with storefronts approaching Delamain building

events.description: walking past a commercial building with large pink neon window displays
approaching the distinctive Delamain building entrance with art deco styling and illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway past various storefronts and advertisements, approaching the Delamain building entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction past the camera

entered.detail: futuristic art deco building facade with illuminated 'Delamain' signage and chrome detailing
commercial establishment with bright magenta neon window lighting
illuminated sign reading 'BREWING' in cyan neon letters

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player walking along the elevated commercial walkway toward the Delamain building. The path passes by a brewing establishment with cyan signage and storefronts with pink neon lighting. The camera approaches the distinctive entrance of the Delamain building, marked by its art deco architecture and prominent illuminated signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the oppressive shadows of a highway underpass into the vibrant, neon-drenched heights of a futuristic commercial plaza. It begins in a dark, covered walkway beneath a massive overpass, moving past concrete pillars and a cyan-lit food stall where wet pavement reflects the sparse light. As the camera pushes through the darkest section of the underpass, vehicle headlights cut through the gloom before the path opens toward glowing pink and cyan digital billboards. The scene then expands as the player emerges from the concrete enclosure into a bright cityscape of glass skyscrapers and palm trees, ascending a wide staircase to an elevated pedestrian plaza with transparent flooring and purple vending machines. Finally, the camera glides along this luminous commercial walkway, passing cyan and pink storefronts before arriving at the art deco entrance of the Delamain building.
